name: INESCAPED
short_description: Inescaped Paranoia is a psychological horror game where paranoia is your worst enemy. As a building inspector sent to assess an abandoned farmhouse, your routine job quickly turns into a descent into fear and uncertainty.
detailed_description:
Inescaped Paranoia is a psychological horror game where paranoia is your worst enemy. As a building inspector sent to assess an abandoned farmhouse, your routine job quickly turns into a descent into fear and uncertainty. The house shifts, your mind distorts reality, and soon, escape feels impossible.

Solve environmental puzzles, uncover hidden truths, and survive a series of psychological trials that test your sanity. But be warned—some horrors exist only in your head, and others are all too real.

Will you make it out, or will you become just another failed victim?

Features:

🧩 Puzzle-Based Horror – Solve cryptic challenges while uncovering the farmhouse’s dark past.
📸 Camera Exploration – Some things can only be seen through the lens.
👁️ Psychological Mind Games – Your surroundings are not what they seem.
🎭 Unpredictable Horror – Randomized jumpscares and disturbing events keep you on edge.

Face your fears. Escape the nightmare. If you can.

Welcome to Inescaped Paranoia
